rule: Do not send yet. Must verify broken links before outreach.
prospecting_method: Search for sites linking to known dead/defunct calculator domains, outdated Flash calculators, and broken fintech embeds
known_dead_calculator_domains: dinkytown.net (many old calculators — site changed domain structure)
calcxml.com (still live but many old embed refs broken)
finance.yahoo.com/calculators (old Yahoo Finance calculator section deprecated)

prospects.page_url_hint: University financial literacy pages linking to dinkytown.net mortgage calculator
prospects.evidence: dinkytown.net structure changed — old embedded tools 404
prospects.outreach_angle: Your page links to a calculator that no longer works — here's a free replacement

prospects.page_url_hint: Nonprofit budget counseling pages with broken Bankrate calculator embeds
prospects.evidence: Bankrate changed URL structure — many old embeds broken
prospects.outreach_angle: I noticed your budget calculator link is broken — here's a working replacement
